top_patterns.description: Open with personal insight or moment, often followed by a motivational or invitational statement.
top_patterns.structure_template: Personal thought / moment + [invitation / reflection / call to action]
example_quotes: Thanks @tetonsnowboarder for a great morning up and down pucker face and no name. Worth every step!
Welcome to the world charlie sage! And on #internationaldayofthegirl nonetheless. Carpe diem indeed!

top_patterns.description: Sharing specific moments, accomplishments, or events with minimal commentary.
example_quotes: Summits first surf session.  53 degrees in water and he did not flinch.
Day two of summits snowboarding school and he says to me when dropping him off I am going to beat the flying tomato when I am older.....

top_patterns.description: Thanking people, organizations, or experiences, often with hashtags or tags.
example_quotes: Thanks @tetonsnowboarder for a great morning up and down pucker face and no name.
Merry Christmas from our family to yours.  #grateful
Caught dreaming and when I woke up I experienced my dream being reality.  My girl.
Almost 3 years and about 50 letters in, I hope he will see this as a gift and not a burden someday.

archetypal_structures.formula: [Describe event or achievement] + [call to action or invitation]
example_quotes: If you EVER get the opportunity to be with these amazing creatures , DO IT.  And help @heathermycoskie protect them.
On Friday night at the #TeenVogueSummit, this group of changemakers reminded us: Kids are not the future. They are here now.

closers: Come on humans, let's get it together.
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often 8-15 words
language_habits.line_break_style: Minimal, often one sentence per line or paragraph

example_quotes: My first-ever boomerang... with the boomerang queen herself!
Welcome to the world charlie sage!
Thanks @tetonsnowboarder for a great morning up and down pucker face.
Merry Christmas from our family to yours.
Day two of summits snowboarding school and he says to me when dropping him off I am going to beat the flying tomato.
Almost 3 years and about 50 letters in, I hope he will see this as a gift.

synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More direct, less formal, more emotive, frequent storytelling
